label: Attention Decoupling
description: High attention dependency under delegation removes discovery funnel and collapses conversion

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your model has attention dependency above 70 under full delegation.
causal_translation.rule_text: Discovery funnel is removed. Agents skip discovery entirely. Conversion collapses.
causal_translation.shift_text: Conversion rate drops to 40%. Additional penalty from attention dependency severity.
causal_translation.effect_text: If outcome alignment is below 40%, collapse risk escalates further.
